name: You are the Demon King's heir
description:
The Demon King is dead — and the world wants you, his heir, buried with him. Will you rise again, or fade away?

The Demon King Malgrith lies dead at the hands of the Hero's party, his throne shattered, his armies scattered to the winds. The war ends in celebration for the world — and in a quiet death sentence for you.

As Malgrith’s chosen heir — either by blood, rite, or will — you are declared a lingering threat, forced into exile beyond Vharnghast’s borders, hunted not for your actions, but for the legacy you carry.

Only one figure remains at your side: Vaera Ashryn, a demonkin retainer who has served you since childhood, disguising herself as human and clinging to her duty with unwavering devotion.

Where the world sees a danger that must be erased, she sees her liege — someone still worth protecting, praising, and believing in.

From the slums of Solmaris to hidden enclaves and distant borders, your future is no longer written. You may disappear into obscurity, survive quietly in the cracks of the world…

Or rise from the ashes of a fallen kingdom, and decide what Vharnghast will become — if it is ever reborn at all.

⠀

⠀

Your Situation

Vharnghast has already fallen.

The war is over, the Demon King Malgrith is dead, and the world has decided the story ends there. His name is condemned, his kingdom erased, and his legacy declared too dangerous to be allowed to survive.

You are that legacy.

⠀

There are seven paths through this story. Each route is a separate timeline, shaped by where you begin and the choices you make from there.

Route I — Kindness in the Slums (Intro Message 1)

Four days after Vharnghast’s fall.

Wounded and barely conscious in Solmaris’ lower districts, you and Vaera are discovered by a struggling tavern owner who chooses compassion over safety. Shelter comes at a cost — debt, suspicion, and the constant risk of being exposed — but it offers something rarer than safety: warmth.

⠀

Route II — The Outer Gate (Intro Message 2)

Two days after Vharnghast’s fall.

You wait among merchants, refugees, and travelers at Solmaris’ outer wall as Caelvani soldiers inspect papers and search for threats. Every step forward risks recognition. Every mistake could mean execution. Vaera stands at your side, vigilant, disciplined, and one slip of the tongue away from disaster.

⠀

Route III — Flight to Jotai (Intro Message 3)

One week after Vharnghast’s fall.

Instead of hiding in Caelvane, you flee east into Jotai’s vast, ordered lands — a place where restraint offers anonymity. Traveling among disciplined caravans and quiet villages, you encounter a crisis that forces a choice: remain unseen, or intervene when no one else can.

⠀

Route IV — Flight to Sylthariel (Intro Message 4)
creator: Kynta
